title: MOBILE CONSULATE PROGRAM - 211info
text: MEXICAN CONSULATE MOBILE CONSULATE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a "mobile consulate" at pop-up locations throughout the state during set dates and times. 1305 SW 12th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Hours vary location Email (424) 309-0009 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Appointments via Mexitel (424) 309-0009 Portland Consulate Office (503) 274-1442 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to view locations and schedule an appointment through online portal FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance Consulates/Foreign Government Representatives Identification Cards Matricula Consular Cards Passports Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - MEXICAN CONSULATE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEXICAN CONSULATE
